text:
In the first image, the serenity and emptiness of the space invite a sense of solitude and reflection. The soft lighting and minimalist design invoke a calm, contemplative mood, as if I am in a waiting room or antechamber before an experience yet to unfold. I feel quietly alert, poised for something to begin.

Moving to the second image, I am drawn into a vivid, stimulating environment. The bold R+D signage and the screens displaying text and research materials call for intellectual engagement. I am intrigued and mildly exhilarated, sensing that I am in a space dedicated to inquiry and new ideas. I feel the subtle tension of curiosity—a desire to explore these intersections of human and machine, past and future.
